title: <div>Students are applying to a job (job posting attached). Provide specific fee
content:
Students are applying to a job (job posting attached). Provide specific feedback in the form of an email on the attached student cover letter and thank you letter: does it address the position being applied to, grammar, formatting, originality. Provide actionable and specific feedback with suggestions for improvement. Include the student's strengths. The email should be from the interim writing studio assistant to the student. Separate to the email provide a grade for me as the instructor. Assign a grade out of 5 points for the cover letter and five points for the thank you letter.

Job Posting: “

”

Cover Letter: “
“

Thank you letter: “  “
